'''Larkor''' was a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] and a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. A [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Larkor's head was claimed by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ssach'thirix]].<ref name="AIR" />
